additional_evidence_checked.result: Official June 2026 HRNZ racing dates page confirms the club-date rows, including Invercargill on 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-11, Forbury Park on 2026-06-21, and Winton on 2026-06-25.

promotion_blocker.reason: HRNZ June source table labels the venue column as Club, not Racecourse. PR-130 C-rank display requires meeting_date + racecourse. Promote only after club-to-racecourse mapping is source-verified for all rows. Current status: 16 of 18 rows can be mapped with high confidence; Invercargill Harness Racing Club Inc and Forbury Park Trotting Club Inc remain unresolved for racecourse promotion. Programme links for the 2026-06-11 Invercargill row and 2026-06-21 Forbury row are now recorded, but their programme body text was not captured.
